mission.title: chaos-mesh: OIDC Authentication in Chaos-Mesh Dashboard
mission.description: OIDC Authentication in Chaos-Mesh Dashboard. Requested by 11+ users.

steps.title: Check current chaos-mesh deployment
steps.description:
Verify your chaos-mesh version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n chaos-mesh -l app.kubernetes.io/name=chaos-mesh
helm list -n chaos-mesh 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working chaos-mesh installation.

steps.title: Review chaos-mesh configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant chaos-mesh configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n chaos-mesh -l app.kubernetes.io/name=chaos-mesh
kubectl get configmap -n chaos-mesh -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=chaos-mesh
```
## Feature Request

**Describe the feature you'd like:**
Kubernetes [supports native OIDC authentication](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/access-authn-authz/authentication/#openid-connect-tokens) when configured correctly.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n chaos-mesh -l app.kubernetes.io/name=chaos-mesh
kubectl get events -n chaos-mesh --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "OIDC Authentication in Chaos-Mesh Dashboard" is functioning correctly.
